aboutCards.title: Who are we?
aboutCards.text: We are a team of tent providers, originally from South Carolina. We started our business in 2024!

aboutCards.title: Why choose MVP Tents
aboutCards.text: We have top quality and elegant tents, our customer service is like no other, and we have options to fit your needs!

owners.name: David Griffin
owners.bio: Dave handles quotes and leads the tent setup. Dave also has 3+ years in event layout planning — he makes sure every tent is perfect.

owners.name: Jack Simpson
owners.bio: Jack handles quotes and tent setup. With 3+ years in event planning, he makes sure every tent is perfect.

quoteText: Our mission is to make your outdoor event truly special and stress-free, with a beautiful tent that exceeds your expectations.
